## Contributors

No additional contributor information at this time.

## Licenses

The overall project is licensed under the **[CC BY-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/)** license found at [LICENSE](LICENSE.llms.md); all code snippets are additionally licensed under the **[CC0 1.0 Universal](https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/)** license found at [LICENSE-CODE](LICENSE-CODE.llms.md).

Why two licenses? The CC BY-SA 4.0 license is for the content of the website, while the CC0 1.0 Universal license is for the code and configuration files. This is a common practice for websites that include code snippets and other content that may be reused in other projects, particularly because the CC BY-SA 4.0 license is not intended to be used with software.

## Notes

This manual was primarily written across 2025 and 2026, and is a living document that will be updated as needed. If you have suggestions for improvements or additions, please open an issue or pull request in the [manual repository](https://github.com/lmu-osc/manual)

Back to top

## Citation

BibTeX citation:

``` quarto-appendix-bibtex
@online{callahan2026,
  author = {Callahan, Pat and Ihle, Malika and Waterfield, Elizabeth},
  title = {LMU {Open} {Science} {Center} {Manual} of {Operations}},
  date = {2026-06-10},
  url = {https://lmu-osc.github.io/manual},
  langid = {en}
}
```

For attribution, please cite this work as:

Callahan, Pat, Malika Ihle, and Elizabeth Waterfield. 2026. “LMU Open Science Center Manual of Operations.” LMU Open Science Center, June 10. <https://lmu-osc.github.io/manual>.
